description_long: This is a Kalashnikov-style assault rifle featuring a dark wooden fixed stock and handguard, paired with a matte black metal receiver and barrel assembly. The rifle has a curved detachable box magazine, typical of AK-pattern firearms, and a prominent front sight post with a protective hood. The rear sight is a notched tangent iron sight mounted on the upper receiver. The metal components exhibit a slightly worn, utilitarian finish, while the wood parts have a rich, reddish-brown hue with visible grain. The overall design is robust and functional, with ergonomic features such as a pistol grip and a slanted magazine for reliable feeding.
description: A Kalashnikov-style assault rifle with a wooden fixed stock, curved magazine, and matte black metal receiver and barrel. The rifle features iron sights and a robust, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the rifle, including the wooden stock, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the buttstock, rear sight, and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the ejection port, magazine release, and the detailed wood grain on the stock and handguard.
